channel.title: Life on RΞCURSION
channel.description: Recent content in Life on RΞCURSION

item.title: A Year Is Enough to Know What You Don't Know
item.description: This post reflects on one year in leadership, tracing lessons about uncertainty, difficult conversations, team silence, mentorship, decision-making, and the cost of trying to lead on empty.

item.title: Two Wheels and a Heartbeat
item.description: This essay makes the case for motorcycles as the best vehicle ever made, blending road culture, Nairobi traffic realities, rider discipline, and the emotional pull of two wheels.
